ItacPersonItem.Notes: Founder of the Accademia degli Argonauti. See A. De Ferrari, `Coronelli, Vincenzo`, in DBI. On Coronelli`s contribution as an illustrator, see Antonio Sartori, `Vincenzo Coronelli e gli artisti che lavorarono per lui`, in Miscellanea francescana, 51 (1951), p. 376.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
